subject: docs(sync): fix stale markdown/CSV references across docs and code
body:
Documentation and user-facing text still referenced markdown and CSV
import after those features were removed. This fixes all stale references
to match the JSON-only import reality.

- TutorialModal step 5: removed markdown import description
- TESTING_GUIDE.md: replaced "Import Markdown" with "Import JSON (Paste)"
- App.css: renamed section headers from "Markdown" to "JSON"/"Import"
- graph-wiki-discovery.md: updated import/export and conventions sections
- CLAUDE.md: added useEscapeKey hook to structure and conventions
- TODO.md: added contentType dead field as tech debt

Tags: docs, sync, stale-references, tutorial, cleanup
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: codebase-audit
Semver: patch
